_comment:
Barometer temperature compensation. ArduPilot-only cold-start procedure: vehicle sits powered but unmoving while the autopilot samples baro readings across the warm-up temperature range, then fits the compensation curve. PX4 has no equivalent procedure — that path surfaces as `error(notImplemented)` with a clean 'not supported on this stack' message.

Long procedure — typically 10-15 minutes of warm-up sampling. Both recoverable failure kinds resolve to `holdStill` since environmental noise (vibration, draft) is the only operator-recoverable cause.

Overall budget is 600s (the parser ceiling) so the recipe at least has the headroom the procedure needs — operators should still wall-clock the actual session and budget accordingly.

then.detail: Barometer temperature calibration is ArduPilot-only and not supported on this vehicle's autopilot stack.
Barometer temperature calibration cancelled by operator.
Barometer temperature calibration failed with an unhandled outcome — see the audit trace for the underlying response.
